mapper.delete: delete from user_favorites uf where uf.user_id=(select u.id from user u where u.username=#{currentUsername}) and uf.article_id=(select a.id from article a where a.slug=#{slug})
mapper.select: select count(1) from user u inner join user_favorites uf on u.id=uf.user_id inner join article a on a.id=uf.article_id where u.username=#{currentUsername} and a.id=#{articlesDTOId}
select exists(select 1 from user_favorites uf where uf.user_id=(select u.id from user u where u.username=#{currentUsername}) and uf.article_id=(select a.id from article a where a.slug=#{slug}))
